---
title: Poleward Shift of Atmospheric Rivers in the Southern Hemisphere in Recent Decades
pagetitle: 2020-11-1-Ma2020a - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2020
author: Weiming Ma, Gang Chen and Bin Guan
venue: Geophysical Research Letters
venue_cit: <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 47, doi:10.1029/2020GL089934.
recommended_citation: 'Weiming Ma, Gang Chen and Bin Guan, 2020: Poleward Shift of
  Atmospheric Rivers in the Southern Hemisphere in Recent Decades, <i>Geophysical
  Research Letters</i>, 47, doi:10.1029/2020GL089934.'
paper_url: https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1029/2020GL089934
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Poleward Shift of Atmospheric Rivers in the Southern Hemisphere in Recent Decades

*Published in Geophysical Research Letters, 2020*

**Recommended citation:** Weiming Ma, Gang Chen and Bin Guan, 2020: Poleward Shift of Atmospheric Rivers in the Southern Hemisphere in Recent Decades, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 47, doi:10.1029/2020GL089934.

[Download paper](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1029/2020GL089934){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
